## How was this tested?

<!-- Describe manual testing steps, and which automated tests you ran. -->

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test:unit`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` (if UI/integration behavior changed)
- [ ] Tested on macOS
- [ ] Tested on Windows
- [ ] Tested on Linux

## Checklist

- [ ] New behavior has tests.
- [ ] IPC contract changes update main, preload, **and** renderer.
- [ ] No hardcoded path separators, shell invocations, or APIs that only
      work on one OS.
- [ ] Docs (README, CONTRIBUTING, inline comments) updated where relevant.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or personal information added to source or
      history.
